moments.title: The Open Championship Final Day
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship concludes today at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, with the final round determining the Champion Golfer of the Year.

angles.name: Live Final
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The final day of The 154th Open Championship is underway at Royal Birkdale. Who will lift the Claret Jug by the end of play today?

angles.name: Golf Drama
angles.copy: Every shot counts on the final Sunday of The Open. Expect drama, incredible skill, and potentially a new golf legend crowned!

moments.title: Tour de France Stage 15
moments.blurb: The Tour de France continues today with Stage 15, a challenging mountain stage from Champagnole to Plateau de Solaison, testing the GC contenders.

angles.name: Mountain Stage
angles.copy: It's a huge day in the mountains at the Tour de France! Stage 15 is underway, pushing riders to their limits on the climbs. Who's making a move?

angles.name: General Classification
angles.copy: The yellow jersey battle heats up on today's gruelling Tour de France mountain stage. Tune in for all the general classification action!

moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Countdown
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games are just four days away, with the Opening Ceremony set for July 23 in Scotland's largest city.

angles.name: Games Nearly Here
angles.copy: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games are almost here! The city is buzzing as we count down to the Opening Ceremony this Thursday. Get ready for incredible sport!

angles.name: Baton Relay
angles.copy: The King's Baton Relay is making its final journey across Scotland, building excitement for the Commonwealth Games Opening Ceremony on July 23rd!

moments.title: AIG Women's Open Approaches
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open, one of golf's major championships, is set to begin on July 29 at Royal Lytham and St Annes in England.

angles.name: Women's Golf Major
angles.copy: The world's best women golfers are heading to Royal Lytham & St Annes for the AIG Women's Open, starting July 29th. Get ready for a week of top-tier golf!

moments.title: Welsh Fire Cricket & Entertainment
moments.blurb: Welsh Fire brings a mix of cricket and entertainment to Sophia Gardens, Cardiff, with former rugby star Josh Navidi DJing on July 25 and Hana Lili performing on July 29.

angles.name: Cricket & Celebs
angles.copy: Beyond the boundary! Welsh Fire at Sophia Gardens isn't just about cricket. Catch Josh Navidi DJing on July 25 and Hana Lili live on July 29. Who's going?

angles.name: Cardiff Summer Hotspot
angles.copy: Sophia Gardens is THE place to be this summer! Welsh Fire combines top-class cricket with live music and guest DJs like Josh Navidi. Grab your tickets!

moments.title: Splendour Festival Concludes Today
moments.blurb: Nottinghamshire's Splendour Festival, set in the grounds of Wollaton Hall, wraps up its multi-genre music event today.

angles.name: Splendour Sunday
angles.copy: It's the final day of Splendour Festival at Wollaton Hall! Who's soaking up the last of the music and good vibes today?

angles.name: Festival Wrap
angles.copy: From rock to pop, Splendour Festival has delivered! What's been your highlight if you were there this weekend?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Weekend
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park in Suffolk from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary with a diverse lineup of music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Suffolk's Big One
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just around the corner! Henham Park is gearing up for its 20th anniversary celebration from July 23-26. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: Music, comedy, arts, and more! Latitude Festival kicks off next Thursday in Suffolk. Have you checked out the full lineup yet?

moments.title: Truck Festival Starts Thursday
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, Oxfordshire's indie and alternative music event, takes place from July 23-26 at Hill Farm, promising a weekend of live music.

angles.name: Oxfordshire Festival
angles.copy: Truck Festival is back! From July 23-26, Hill Farm in Oxfordshire will be buzzing with indie and alternative acts. Who's got their tickets?

moments.title: Together Again Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival at Bolesworth Castle, Cheshire, from July 24-26, promises world-class music, vibrant arenas, and a family-friendly atmosphere.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival
angles.copy: Bolesworth Castle is hosting Together Again Festival this weekend! Three days of music across six stages – who's heading to Cheshire?

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: Madonna and Sabrina Carpenter hit No.1 with 'Bring Your Love' on the latest Official UK Singles Chart (week ending July 23), while World Cup fever sees Oasis and Three Lions re-enter the Top 3.

angles.name: New No.1
angles.copy: Massive news on the charts! Madonna & Sabrina Carpenter are officially #1 with 'Bring Your Love' this week! What a collaboration!

angles.name: World Cup Chart Impact
angles.copy: World Cup fever has hit the charts! Oasis's 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' are back in the Top 3. The power of football!

angles.name: Madonna's Return
angles.copy: 18 years later, Madonna is back at #1! 'Bring Your Love' with Sabrina Carpenter is her first chart-topper since 2008. The Queen reigns on!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Today, July 19, marks the 79th birthday of legendary Queen guitarist Brian May, known for his iconic riffs and contributions to rock music.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your all-time favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Queen's Guitarist
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of rock royalty, Brian May of Queen, who turns 79 today! Send him your best wishes!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Tomorrow, July 20, guitar virtuoso Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday, a pioneer of Latin rock and global music.

angles.name: Guitar Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana tomorrow! What's your favourite Santana track?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: On July 21, Don Henley, the legendary drummer and vocalist for the Eagles, turns 79, a voice synonymous with classic rock and soft rock hits.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' Don Henley on July 21! Which of his iconic songs is on your playlist today?

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk music icon George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday on July 22, a true innovator of sound.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Get up for the downstroke! Wishing a very Happy 85th Birthday to the legendary George Clinton this Wednesday!

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' legendary guitarist Slash, known for his distinctive top hat and electrifying solos, turns 61 on July 23.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the incredible Slash! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses anthem featuring his iconic guitar work?

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24, continuing her reign as an icon in music, film, and fashion.

angles.name: JLo's Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 on July 24. What's your go-to J.Lo track to get the party started?

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26, still rocking stages worldwide.

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger turns 83 on July 26! The ultimate rock 'n' roll frontman still has it. What's your favourite Stones hit?

moments.title: Happy 73rd Birthday Geddy Lee
moments.blurb: Rush bassist and vocalist Geddy Lee celebrates his 73rd birthday on July 29, a progressive rock legend.

angles.name: Rush Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the incredible Geddy Lee of Rush on July 29! Celebrate with your favourite Rush track!

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays are starting across the UK this week, with many schools in England and Wales breaking up from July 20-23, and Scotland from July 21.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: That's it, school's out for summer! Many pupils across the UK are officially on their summer holidays this week. What are your plans?

angles.name: Welsh School Holidays
angles.copy: The summer holidays are here for many in Wales! Enjoy the break, stay safe, and have some fun in the sun!

moments.title: Welsh Water Hosepipe Ban
moments.blurb: Dŵr Cymru Welsh Water introduces a Temporary Use Ban (hosepipe ban) from today, July 19, across parts of Ceredigion, Pembrokeshire, and Carmarthenshire due to high demand.

angles.name: Hosepipe Ban Begins
angles.copy: Important update for West Wales: A hosepipe ban comes into effect today in parts of Ceredigion, Pembrokeshire, and Carmarthenshire. Please be water-wise!

angles.name: Water Saving Tips
angles.copy: With a hosepipe ban now in place for some areas, let's all do our bit to save water. Every drop counts! Find tips on the Welsh Water website.

moments.title: Rhinogydd Mountains Fire Continues
moments.blurb: Fire crews remain in attendance at the ongoing fire in the Rhinogydd mountains near Cwm Bychan Lake in North Wales, with smoke potentially affecting new areas due to wind changes.

source.l: North Wales Fire And Rescue Service

angles.name: North Wales Fire
angles.copy: Our thoughts are with the crews still battling the Rhinogydd mountain fire in North Wales. Be aware of smoke if you're in the Cwm Bychan area.
